title: Azotos #0108
definition:
Ashdod or Azotus = "a stronghold"

 1) one of the five chief cities of the Philistines, lying between
    Ashkelon and Jamnia and near the Mediterranean
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the five chief cities of the Philistines, lying between
    Ashkelon and Jamnia and near the Mediterranean
